description: Name or number of the chromosome

Distance of the region to the Transcription Start Site (TSS). A negative distance indicates that the TSS is upstream of the methylated base or region and a positive distance indicates that the TSS is downstream of the methylated base or region. 0 indicates that the TSS overlaps with the methylated region. For regions, the distance is measured from the end of the region closest to the TSS.
Indicates whether the region overlaps with the promoter
Indicates whether the region overlaps with an exon
Indicates whether the region overlaps with an intron
